title: Crisp Smoky French Tagliatelle Tartiflette
description: A smoky and crisp French dish featuring tagliatelle, dry-brined and cooked to perfection in a tartiflette form, served in a bento box, this recipe is ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly and inspired by the flavors of Provence.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the tagliatelle according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the minced garlic.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced potatoes and cook for 5 minutes, or until they start to brown.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked tagliatelle, potato mixture, crumbly reblochon cheese, salt, black pepper, and chopped fresh thyme.
Transfer the mixture to a bento box and drizzle with lemon juice.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
